{ "name": "league/flysystem-local", "description": "Local filesystem adapter for Flysystem.", "keywords": ["flysystem", "filesystem", "local", "file", "files"], "type": "library", "prefer-stable": true, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "League\\Flysystem\\Local\\": "" } }, "require": { "php": "^8.0.2", "ext-fileinfo": "*", "league/flysystem": "^3.0.0", "league/mime-type-detection": "^1.0.0" }, "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Frank de Jonge", "email": "info@frankdejonge.nl" } ] }
